--- Goliath — Winged Striker --- HP: 51/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:16+6=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
